message:
chore(deps): bump glamour v0.10.0 to v1.0.0

Honorary major version bump with no breaking API changes.
Fix-merge of dependabot PR #2484 (merge conflict with main).

Co-Authored-By: dependabot[bot] <49699333+dependabot[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
